articles.title: Global Economics Intelligence executive summary, May 2026
articles.summary: As energy prices trend higher and drive inflation, consumer confidence is ebbing—and central banks have a dilemma: whether to tackle inflation by raising policy rates or ease them to provide a stimulus.

articles.title: African bedrock: How the continent’s minerals can help power the world
articles.summary: Critical minerals underpin everything from AI to low-carbon energy, and African mining sits at the epicenter. Three key moves can help unlock the continent’s natural minerals advantage.
